decisions.description: Preserve and extend existing World Monitor architecture instead of replacing it
decisions.rationale: Existing map, panel, provider, cache, API, MCP, desktop and finance architecture is mature

decisions.description: Use a neutral typed read-only context contract and clean-room runtime provider
decisions.rationale: Smallest replayable integration that preserves AGPL/MIT separation

decisions.description: Use static/file payload transport first; defer API/MCP/event streaming
decisions.rationale: Minimizes availability, auth and prompt-injection coupling

decisions.description: Do not implement ASX breadth before licensed universe, point-in-time membership and corporate actions
decisions.rationale: Prevents false coverage and survivorship bias

decisions.description: Do not migrate out of Agent-Repo-Atlas until a known-green World Monitor SHA exists
Reuse existing stock agent roles before proposing a Cross-Domain Market Context Analyst
decisions.rationale: Avoids redundant role proliferation without evaluation evidence
